framework.name: The Delegation Chain Is Already Breaking
framework.description: Article confirms the thesis: every framework presented (Kolt, NIST, Baker Botts model, state laws) solves human→agent. NONE address agent₁→agent₂→agent₃. Yet 45 billion non-human identities expected by end of 2026. The governance gap is not theoretical — it's structural and acknowledged by the very bodies trying to fill it.
framework.raw_quote: Non-human and agentic identities are expected to exceed 45 billion by the end of 2026, more than twelve times the human global workforce. Yet only 10% of organizations report having a strategy for managing these autonomous systems.

source.title: When AI Agents Misbehave: Governance and Security for ... - Our Take
